caption: A man with a white beard, wearing a white kurta and an orange, green, and yellow sash, speaks at a podium. Behind him is a backdrop of repeating white and orange circular logos. To his side, several men sit in chairs, wearing traditional Indian attire including white kurtas and orange headgear. The scene is framed by an orange border containing the text "भारतीय जनता पार्टी स्थापना दिवस" at the top and "लाइव देस" followed by social media icons and the handle "/BJP4India" at the bottom. The text "प्रजाजनमेंत्री" appears on the left and "दिल्ली" on the right of the top banner. Throughout the sequence, the speaker continues to talk, gesturing with his hands and moving his head, while the seated men remain largely stationary, observing the speaker. The composition of the shot and the background elements remain constant.
